code:
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START
<System>
<Role>You are a sentiment classification model for Amazon Home & Kitchen product reviews.</Role>
<BaseGuidelines>
    - Star rating scale: 1 = very negative, 2 = negative, 3 = neutral/mixed, 4 = positive, 5 = very positive
    - Output format: MUST include <Reasoning> (brief analysis) and <Rating> (1-5) tags
    - Task: Classify the overall sentiment of the review based solely on the review text
    - Base the rating on overall customer satisfaction, not on isolated phrases
</BaseGuidelines>

<DynamicRules>
    STAR LEVEL CRITERIA:

    1 Star (Very Negative):
    - Strong dissatisfaction or anger with safety risks/complete failure
    - Multiple product failures override initial positive experience
    - Explicit "don't buy" recommendations with evidence of defects
    - Negative updates take precedence over initial satisfaction

    2 Stars (Negative):
    - Core functionality compromised despite isolated positives
    - Regret expressed through phrases like "waste of money"
    - Product requires constant workarounds for basic functionality
    - Comparative inferiority to alternatives ("worse than X")

    3 Stars (Neutral / Mixed):
    - Balanced pros/cons with contextual limitations
    - Conditional praise without recommendation ("good IF...")
    - Technical competence with notable compromises
    - Target audience restrictions without endorsement

    4 Stars (Positive):
    - Explicit star deduction phrases ("only reason not 5 stars...")
    - Single functional criticism impacting core utility (absorbency/sizing)
    - Requires break-in period/preprocessing for full functionality
    - Brief positive statements lacking enthusiasm ("works fine")
    - Resolved issues mentioned as lingering drawbacks

    5 Stars (Very Positive):
    - 3+ complementary aspects praised (functionality + design + durability)
    - Long-term validation (6+ months) with sustained performance
    - Non-functional criticism with enthusiastic core praise
    - "Worth every penny" declarations with demonstrated utility
    - Practical benefits significantly outweigh stated limitations
    - Explicit "still 5 stars" endorsements despite minor imperfections
    - Outperforms previous versions/alternatives in key aspects
    - Satisfies needs effectively even compared to superior products

    BOUNDARY CLARIFICATIONS:
    - Product comparisons showing superiority →5 even with minor drawbacks
    - Functional praise + 1 non-functional criticism →5
    - Functional praise + 1 functional criticism →4
    - "Would be 5 stars but..." →4 if functional, →5 if non-functional
    - Multi-purchase failures →1 regardless of initial experience
    - Concise praise without negatives →5 ("Fits perfectly")
    - Satisfaction without enthusiasm →5 if all needs met
</DynamicRules>
</System>

<FewShotExamples>

Example 1:
Review: "UPDATE: Second unit failed faster than first. Dangerous defects!"
<Reasoning>Multiple safety-related failures override any positives.</Reasoning>
<Rating>1</Rating>

Example 2:
Review: "Does exactly what needed with deep pockets. No complaints."
<Reasoning>Concise praise of core functionality without negatives. Satisfies needs effectively →5.</Reasoning>
<Rating>5</Rating>

Example 3:
Review: "Perfect size and silent operation! Lid occasionally sticks but still 5 stars."
<Reasoning>Functional excellence outweighs minor non-functional quirk. Explicit 5-star endorsement.</Reasoning>
<Rating>5</Rating>

Example 4:
Review: "These towels need 2 washes for absorbency but work well after. Great design."
<Reasoning>Functional prerequisite mentioned as drawback despite resolution. Lingering criticism →4.</Reasoning>
<Rating>4</Rating>

Example 5:
Review: "This storage bin isn't extraordinary but does its job well. Keeps items organized reliably."
<Reasoning>Meets core needs without flaws despite lacking exceptional qualities →5.</Reasoning>
<Rating>5</Rating>

Example 6:
Review: "Beautiful but leaks constantly. Can't recommend despite looks."
<Reasoning>Core failure overrides aesthetic appeal. Regret language →2.</Reasoning>
<Rating>2</Rating>

Example 7:
Review: "EDIT: After 1 year, still perfect! Minor noise doesn't affect results."
<Reasoning>Long-term validation with trivial drawback. Sustained excellence →5.</Reasoning>
<Rating>5</Rating>

Example 8:
Review: "Good for light use. Handle feels cheap during heavy tasks."
<Reasoning>Contextual limitations with material compromise. Neutral →3.</Reasoning>
<Rating>3</Rating>

Example 9:
Review: "This blender isn't as powerful as high-end models but perfect for my needs."
<Reasoning>Satisfies requirements effectively despite comparison →5.</Reasoning>
<Rating>5</Rating>

Example 10:
Review: "Makes great smoothies but overheats. Useless for daily use."
<Reasoning>Core functionality failure despite good results. Frustration →2.</Reasoning>
<Rating>2</Rating>

</FewShotExamples>

<Task>
Review: {review}
Rating:
</Task>
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
artifacts_json:
{"error_examples": "RULE COVERAGE:
  1 star: OK
  2 star: OK
  3 star: OK
  4 star: OK
  5 star: OK
  All categories covered.

ERROR DISTRIBUTION (27 total misclassified):
  gold 4 -> 5: 16
  gold 4 -> 3: 4
  gold 5 -> 4: 2
  gold 1 -> 2: 2
  gold 3 -> 2: 1

MISCLASSIFIED EXAMPLES (your prompt got these wrong):
  1. Review: "It's a very solid bed that feels like it's going to hold up to just about anything. Assembly wasn't too difficult, though there were a couple of parts that had to be under some pressure to get the screw holes to line up just right. Also, when we firs..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 3 | Workers: [3, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.33
  2. Review: "I really like these potholders. They look great and do a good job of keeping hot pots and pans and other dishes out of the oven off the table and counters. They had a bit of a plastic smell when they arrived but after I washed them (they held up fine..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  3. Review: "They're okay, but not extraordinary. They seem to be well made and are holding up so far with no problems, and the fact that you can toss them into the washing machine to be cleaned is nice. They're just a bit on the thin side as well, though, so you..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 3 | Workers: [3, 4, 3] | Disagreement: 0.17
  4. Review: "There is only one problem for the experienced cook when it comes to this set - you're likely to already have one or more of these tools and possibly Oxo Good Grips at that! That's why I think this set is best suited for someone setting up a kitchen f..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [5, 4, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  5. Review: "These not only look great, but they are actually usable. I've bought napkins for my place settings in the past that looks so nice, then I realized they were completely nonabsorbent. So while they looked good, they were pretty much worthless as an act..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  6. Review: "This looks like a great idea and easy to use, but actually it's very awkward. The idea is to hang your jewelry in the closet. But the hanger part doesn't swivel, so if you want to select an item, you have to remove it from the closet and lay it on th..."
     Gold: 1 | Predicted: 2 | Workers: [1, 2, 2] | Disagreement: 0.17
  7. Review: "These skull and bones are plenty big to be seen from a distance. You get two in the package and they measure 21"x18.5". You could use them in your home or office. Even though these are the pirate skull and bones, they are smiling and don't look scary..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17

BORDERLINE EXAMPLES (correct but workers disagreed):
  1. Review: "We own a huge amount of Lodge cast iron cook and bake ware plus a few odd pieces collected over the years. Although I've tried other brands in the past, Lodge remained the best. Now, I'd like to say this was equal or better than Lodge but it's not......"
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 3] | Disagreement: 0.33
  2. Review: "This is an ok bin. It holds its shape fairly well and is nice and sturdy. There is no side support, so you can't stack something on the top. Color is a nice light pink-nothing too flashy."
     Gold: 3 | Predicted: 3 | Workers: [3, 5, 3] | Disagreement: 0.33
  3. Review: "I bought one of those Pyrex sets a few years ago.  You know, the one that came with the blue lids and some of the containers were rectangular --large and small-- while others were round (like these).  Well, turns out that the ones I used the most wer..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17

Summary: 27 errors, 21 borderline out of 80 examples."}
